title: Firewall management access must be restricted
reason: The control is new or now rated high severity.
fix_summary: Restrict firewall management access to approved networks.

title: Windows audit policy must be configured and reviewed
reason: The control is new or now rated high severity.
check_summary: Review Windows audit policy settings in Local Security Policy and export applied GPO evidence.
